editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=2 of 226 available trials included; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered. Justify exclusions or expand eligibility.
Prediction interval not definable for k<3; flag as boundary condition.
Pooled 0.29 diverges from Hammond 2022 benchmark (RR 0.11 [0.05, 0.23]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
k<3 - NNT ≈ 23 (computed from current trial pool); cannot project to future populations without k>=3 (prediction interval undefined). Interpret MCID against trial-specific populations only.
I² = 92.5% (considerable); show subgroup/strata estimates alongside pooled.
QoL / PROs reported in 2 trial(s) (FACT (generic)) but not in headline pool; consider adding as a secondary analysis rather than omitting.
